name: MSI GeForce RTX 4080 Super 16GB Ventus 3X OC Graphics Card
description: MSI GeForce RTX 4080 Super 16GB Ventus 3X OC Graphics Card What is MSI GeForce RTX 4080 Super 16GB Ventus 3X OC Graphics Card price in Pakistan? MSI GeForce RTX 4080 Super 16GB Ventus 3X OC Graphics Card price in Pakistan is Rs.460,000. It features NVIDIA RTX 4080 Super GPU with 10240 CUDA cores and boost clock up to 2595 MHz along with 16GB GDDR6X memory for ultra-high-end 4K gaming and rendering. Built on PCIe Gen 4 interface with HDMI 2.1a and DisplayPort 1.4a outputs, it supports ray tracing
